title: rubus thelybatoides
intro: Rubus thelybatoides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae), characterized by its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus thelybatoides include its ability to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-cancer properties. Rubus thelybatoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
